mocks.description: Stub watercolor generator standing in for the real @rotheric/visuals git dependency (originally documented under the erroneous placeholder name @ink/visuals, corrected 2026-07-06). Returns a valid, self-contained placeholder SVG that varies its output per call (AC-UX-1) while honoring the pinned StyleToken. Introduced by S2 (dynamic-visuals-adapter-registry-stub).
mocks.interface_mocked: DYNAMIC_GENERATORS.watercolor(style, kind, render?) => string, satisfied as of S7 by @rotheric/visuals's renderSVG API (git dependency pinned to the visuals-v0.1.2 tag)
mocks.resolution_note: S7 (wire-real-visuals-git-dependency) replaced the inline stub in app/src/themes/treatments/dynamicVisuals.ts with a real import of @rotheric/visuals; package.json now declares the git dependency (github:rotheric/ink#visuals-v0.1.2, resolved to the immutable visuals-v0.1.2 tag commit in package-lock.json). Verified: real `npm install`/`npm ci` against the pinned tag (via this session's available HTTPS+gh-token credential path — SSH was unavailable in this sandbox), `next build` under output:'export' succeeds with no sharp/Node-only dependency reachable in the client bundle, and the re-targeted AC-UX-1/AC-STRUCT-4/AC-STRUCT-6 tests pass against the real package's actual output.
